projects.title: Portfolio
projects.details: For 5 marks - Portfolio that includes classwork and other sample of student's work.

practicals.title: Preparation of solutions (Class IX)
practicals.details: 1. Preparation of: a) a true solution of common salt, sugar and alum b) a suspension of soil, chalk powder and fine sand in water c) a colloidal solution of starch in water and egg albumin/milk in water

practicals.title: Preparation of mixture/compound (Class IX)
practicals.details: 2. Preparation of a) A mixture b) A compound using iron filings and sulphur powder

practicals.title: Physical/Chemical changes reactions (Class IX)
practicals.details: 3. Perform the following reactions: Iron with copper sulphate solution, Burning of magnesium ribbon in air, Zinc with dilute sulphuric acid, Heating of copper sulphate crystals, Sodium sulphate with barium chloride

practicals.title: Stained temporary mounts (Class IX)
practicals.details: 4. Preparation of stained temporary mounts of onion peel and human cheek cells

practicals.title: Identification of tissues (Class IX)
practicals.details: 5. Identification of Parenchyma, Collenchyma and Sclerenchyma tissues in plants; muscle fibers and nerve cells

practicals.title: Melting/Boiling point determination (Class IX)
practicals.details: 6. Determination of the melting point of ice and the boiling point of water

practicals.title: Laws of reflection of sound (Class IX)
practicals.details: 7. Verification of the laws of reflection of sound

practicals.title: Density determination (Class IX)
practicals.details: 8. Determination of the density of solid denser than water by using a spring balance and measuring cylinder

practicals.title: Archimedes' Principle verification (Class IX)
practicals.details: 9. Establishing the relation between loss in weight of a solid when fully immersed and weight of water displaced

practicals.title: Speed of pulse propagation (Class IX)
practicals.details: 10. Determination of the speed of a pulse propagated through a stretched string/slinky

practicals.title: Conservation of mass verification (Class IX)
practicals.details: 11. Verification of the law of conservation of mass in a chemical reaction

practicals.title: pH determination (Class X)
practicals.details: 1. A. Finding the pH of samples: Dilute Hydrochloric Acid, Dilute NaOH solution, Dilute Ethanoic Acid, Lemon juice, Water, Dilute Hydrogen Carbonate

practicals.title: Properties of acids/bases reactions (Class X)
practicals.details: 2. Performing reactions: Action of water on quicklime, Heat on ferrous sulphate crystals, Iron nails in copper sulphate solution, Sodium sulphate with barium chloride

practicals.title: Reactivity series experiment (Class X)
practicals.details: 3. Observing action of Zn, Fe, Cu and Al metals on salt solutions to arrange in decreasing order of reactivity

practicals.title: Ohm's Law verification (Class X)
practicals.details: 4. Studying dependence of potential difference across a resistor on current and plotting V-I graph

practicals.title: Equivalent resistance (Class X)
practicals.details: 5. Determination of equivalent resistance of two resistors in series and parallel

practicals.title: Stomata observation (Class X)
practicals.details: 6. Preparing a temporary mount of a leaf peel to show stomata

practicals.title: CO2 in respiration experiment (Class X)
practicals.details: 7. Experimentally showing that carbon dioxide is given out during respiration

practicals.title: Acetic acid properties (Class X)
practicals.details: 8. Study of odour, solubility in water, effect on litmus, reaction with Sodium Hydrogen Carbonate

practicals.title: Soap cleaning capacity (Class X)
practicals.details: 9. Study of comparative cleaning capacity of soap in soft and hard water

practicals.title: Focal length determination (Class X)
practicals.details: 10. Determination of focal length of Concave mirror and Convex lens

practicals.title: Glass slab refraction tracing (Class X)
practicals.details: 11. Tracing path of light through rectangular glass slab for different angles

practicals.title: Binary fission/Budding study (Class X)
practicals.details: 12. Studying binary fission in Amoeba and budding in yeast/Hydra

practicals.title: Prism refraction tracing (Class X)
practicals.details: 13. Tracing path of rays through a glass prism

practicals.title: Embryo identification (Class X)
practicals.details: 14. Identification of parts of an embryo of a dicot seed (pea, gram or red kidney bean)
